evals.name: find-dead-code
evals.prompt: 이 프로젝트에서 안 쓰이는 코드 찾아줘. dead export나 사용되지 않는 함수 있는지 확인해봐.
evals.expected_output: Should use LSP documentSymbol to enumerate exports, findReferences to check usage, incomingCalls for functions. Report dead exports and unreachable functions with file:line locations.

assertions.text: Uses LSP documentSymbol to enumerate exported symbols
Uses LSP findReferences to check for external usage
Excludes entry points (_generated/, test files, config files) from analysis
Reports findings with file path and line number
Produces a summary with error/warning/info counts

evals.name: check-boundary-violations
evals.prompt: audit the codebase for import boundary violations. I want to make sure convex/ doesn't import from src/ and that ontology domain isolation is maintained.
evals.expected_output: Should parse imports, resolve via LSP goToDefinition, check boundary rules from ontology-authority.md (DATA→LOGIC prohibited, convex/→src/ prohibited). Report violations as errors.

assertions.text: Parses import statements from TypeScript files
Checks ontology domain isolation rules (DATA→LOGIC, DATA→ACTION, LOGIC→ACTION prohibited)
Does NOT reference deleted schemas (schemas/lsp-audit/, schemas/convex/, etc.)
